Package javadraw.internal

Class Text

java.lang.Object
javadraw.internal.ObjectDrawObject
javadraw.internal.ObjectDrawShape
javadraw.internal.Text
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Dependent, Drawable2DInterface, DrawableInterface, LocatableInterface, TextWrappingLayout.TextRun
public class Text extends ObjectDrawShape implements Drawable2DInterface, TextWrappingLayout.TextRun, Serializable
